Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-16 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker shows VELO and BTSG as the top two performers with strikingly different risk profiles. VELO ranks #1 with a 91.6 composite score, delivering exceptional consistency across all timeframes (197% one-year return, 34.7% one-month return) while passing all SMA gates and maintaining a near-perfect 99.4 score on bad SPY days, suggesting its gains are independent of broader market stress. BTSG ranks #2 with a 202.83% one-year return but shows volatile ratio progression (54.98x from 1d-1w ratio indicates extreme micro-volatility) and much weaker relative performance versus SPY over shorter periods (only 9.27% outperformance in one month versus VELO's 33.19%), signaling its momentum may be more fragile. Both pass all technical gates and beat major indices over the full year, but VELO's superior ratio consistency and bad-day resilience indicate more reliable, sustainable momentum versus BTSG's spike-driven gains.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
